name: MINGLE [Carousel Game]
image_alt: MINGLE [Carousel Game] - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about MINGLE [Carousel Game]
about_game:
Hop on and vibe with friends in MINGLE 🎠 - a social Roblox carousel game that’s all about connection, conversation, and chill energy. Learn how to ride, chat, and discover hidden secrets as you spin through a colorful world built for making memories.
MINGLE 🎠 (MINGLE [Carousel Game]) is a fast, round-based survival experience inspired by Squid Game. The host calls out a random number, the carousel stops, and everyone sprints for the doors - you have to end up in a room with exactly that many players, no more and no less, or you’re eliminated. While the platform spins between rounds, players reposition, plan, and sometimes shove each other off course using pushes or grabs. It’s simple to understand but brutal in practice, especially when only a handful of slots remain. Highlights:
🎠 Spinning carousel platform that sets up each survival round
🔢 Host calls out a target player count – reach a room with that exact number to live
💥 Push and grab mechanics to knock others out of “your” room
🩸 Sudden eliminations for overcrowded, empty, or wrong rooms
🗣️ Optional VC servers for extra chaos and coordination
Read all about MINGLE 🎠 and get the best tricks and tips here 💫

Each block you place earns coins, unlocks new materials, and pushes your build higher into the sky. It’s all about precision, patience, and the thrill of watching your tower reach new heights. Highlights:
🏗️ Stack blocks to create tall and stable towers
🧱 Unlock new materials like steel, glass, or neon blocks
💰 Earn coins for every successful placement
🎯 Complete building challenges for bonus rewards
🌤️ Build solo or compete against friends to reach the sky first
Read all about Build a Tower 🏗️ and get the best tricks and tips here 🌆

about_title: Everything you need to know about Shrink Hide & Seek
about_game:
Get tiny and get sneaky in Shrink Hide & Seek 🔎 - a fast, funny Roblox game where shrinking down to toy-size helps you outsmart the seeker. Learn how to hide in impossible spots, use size-changing boosts, and master every map with creative strategies.
Shrink Hide & Seek 🔎 is a chaotic twist on classic hide-and-seek where you can shrink, hide, and slip into spots no normal-sized player could ever reach. Explore giant rooms from a tiny perspective, climb objects, and use size-changing boosts to stay hidden longer or escape the seeker. It’s all about creativity, movement, and clever plays. Highlights:
🔎 Shrink to different sizes to hide in crazy, unexpected spots
🏃 Outsmart seekers with boosts, jumps, and speed tricks
🗺️ Explore huge maps designed for tiny players
🎯 Complete quests and earn coins for skins and effects
😂 Watch hilarious chases as tiny runners zoom past giant seekers
Read all about Shrink Hide & Seek 🔎 and get the best tricks and tips here 🪄

about_title: Everything you need to know about [BLACK DEATH] Jujutsu Shenanigans
about_game:
Jujutsu Shenanigans 🤞🔥 drops you straight into the cursed energy-fueled world of Jujutsu Kaisen where button-mashing will get you demolished. Combat is deeper than most anime games, making skill, M1 trading, and ability timing essential for winning intense PvP fights and battlegrounds encounters. Highlights:
⚔️ Master character-specific cursed techniques and neutral combat
🔥 Fight through deep, skill-based PvP, quests, and massive boss battles
💎 Upgrade abilities, manage cursed energy, and unlock new tactical layers
🌍 Progress through a punishing learning curve to dominate the lobby
🏆 Earn rare items, cursed tools, and unique drops from group challenges
Read all about Jujutsu Shenanigans 🤞🔥 and get the best tricks and tips here 💥

name: PLS DONATE 💸
image_alt: PLS DONATE 💸 - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about PLS DONATE 💸
about_game:
Jump into PLS DONATE 💸 - the ultimate Roblox donation hub where you set up a stand, showcase your creativity, and earn Robux from other players. Learn how to make eye-catching booths, attract donators, and grow your earnings with smart strategies.
PLS DONATE 💸 is a social donation game where players customize booths, advertise their talents, and receive Robux from generous visitors. Whether you’re selling art, jokes, gamepasses, clothing, or just vibing with a funny sign, the goal is simple: stand out and get donated to. The game thrives on humor, creativity, and good vibes - but smart booth design helps too. Highlights:
💸 Set up your own booth and earn Robux from players
🎨 Customize signs, boards, and booth themes to attract attention
🎤 Use emotes, music, and jokes to bring people in
🧁 Sell clothing, art, or gamepasses to boost donations
🌎 Explore public, voice chat, and themed servers to meet donators
Read all about PLS DONATE 💸 and get the best tricks and tips here ⭐

name: Anime Vanguards
image_alt: Anime Vanguards - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about Anime Vanguards
about_game:
Assemble your dream team of anime heroes and lead them into epic tower battles! Discover how to summon powerful units, upgrade your squad, and dominate every wave like a true anime tactician.
Anime Vanguards ⚔️ is a strategic Roblox tower defense where anime-style heroes hold the line against huge enemy waves. Build a squad, place units on the path, and upgrade them mid-battle to keep the horde from reaching your base. Instead of handing you tons of free rolls, the game makes you earn your summons through smart play and gem farming, which makes every powerful unit feel earned. Highlights:
⚔️ Tower defense gameplay with heroes inspired by classic anime
💎 Pick a starter rare unit, then grind gems for banner summons
🌟 Upgrade and evolve units to unlock stronger forms and attacks
📖 Story mode stages, quests, and challenges that reward gems and items
🤝 Co-op and late-game modes designed for your strongest teams
Read all about Anime Vanguards ⚔️ and get the best tricks and tips here 🌸

name: Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐]
image_alt: Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐] - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐]
about_game:
Test your luck and chase rare auras in Sol’s RNG 🌞 - a Roblox game where every roll could unlock something extraordinary. Learn how to maximize your odds, collect divine auras, and flex your rarest finds with cosmic style.
Sol’s RNG 🌞 is a Roblox luck-based collector game where you stand on a small island and roll for auras with wildly different rarities. Every press of the Roll button has a chance to give you something common… or a one-in-a-billion flex. As you play, you’ll store auras in your inventory, craft gear at Jake’s Workshop, and upgrade potions with Stella to push your luck even higher.
Highlights:
🌞 Roll infinitely for dozens of unique auras with massively different rarity tiers
💫 Use luck boosts like 2x rolls, Auto Roll, and crafted items to speed up progress
🧪 Collect and upgrade potions to get powerful temporary luck buffs
⚙️ Craft items at Jake’s Workshop that improve luck or reduce roll cooldown
📦 Manage storage, coins, and recipes while chasing the rarest auras in the game
Read all about Sol’s RNG 🌞 and get the best tricks and tips here 💫

name: Brainrot Evolution
image_alt: Brainrot Evolution - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about Brainrot Evolution
about_game:
Step into the chaos of Brainrot Evolution 🧠 - a meme-fueled Roblox experience where your mind mutates with every stage. Learn how to evolve through internet-inspired forms, survive the madness, and become the ultimate Brainrot overlord.
Brainrot Evolution 🧠 is an incremental Roblox simulation game built around leveling, evolving, and collecting. You start as a basic brainrot character and gain EXP, Gems, and Wins by consuming creatures, fruits, and objects scattered around the map. As you level up, you unlock new evolutions based on viral brainrot memes, tougher enemies, new areas, and more progression systems like Pets, Relics, and Rebirths. Highlights:
🧠 Unlock new meme-inspired evolutions by leveling up
💪 Eat and smash objects and enemies to gain EXP, Gems, and Wins
🐾 Hatch pets from eggs with Wins to multiply your damage
📿 Collect relics from chests, dungeons, and events for extra boosts
🔁 Use Rebirths to restart stronger and access new content
Read all about Brainrot Evolution 🧠 and get the best tricks and tips here 💀

name: [BLACK DEATH] Jujutsu Shenanigans
image_alt: [BLACK DEATH] Jujutsu Shenanigans - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about [BLACK DEATH] Jujutsu Shenanigans
about_game:
Jujutsu Shenanigans 🤞🔥 drops you straight into the cursed energy-fueled world of Jujutsu Kaisen where button-mashing will get you demolished. Combat is deeper than most anime games, making skill, M1 trading, and ability timing essential for winning intense PvP fights and battlegrounds encounters. Highlights:
⚔️ Master character-specific cursed techniques and neutral combat
🔥 Fight through deep, skill-based PvP, quests, and massive boss battles
💎 Upgrade abilities, manage cursed energy, and unlock new tactical layers
🌍 Progress through a punishing learning curve to dominate the lobby
🏆 Earn rare items, cursed tools, and unique drops from group challenges
Read all about Jujutsu Shenanigans 🤞🔥 and get the best tricks and tips here 💥

name: Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐]
image_alt: Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐] - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐]
about_game:
Test your luck and chase rare auras in Sol’s RNG 🌞 - a Roblox game where every roll could unlock something extraordinary. Learn how to maximize your odds, collect divine auras, and flex your rarest finds with cosmic style.
Sol’s RNG 🌞 is a Roblox luck-based collector game where you stand on a small island and roll for auras with wildly different rarities. Every press of the Roll button has a chance to give you something common… or a one-in-a-billion flex. As you play, you’ll store auras in your inventory, craft gear at Jake’s Workshop, and upgrade potions with Stella to push your luck even higher.
Highlights:
🌞 Roll infinitely for dozens of unique auras with massively different rarity tiers
💫 Use luck boosts like 2x rolls, Auto Roll, and crafted items to speed up progress
🧪 Collect and upgrade potions to get powerful temporary luck buffs
⚙️ Craft items at Jake’s Workshop that improve luck or reduce roll cooldown
📦 Manage storage, coins, and recipes while chasing the rarest auras in the game
Read all about Sol’s RNG 🌞 and get the best tricks and tips here 💫

name: [🌎 World 3 💫] Anime Last Stand
image_alt: [🌎 World 3 💫] Anime Last Stand - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about [🌎 World 3 💫] Anime Last Stand
about_game:
Assemble a squad of powerful anime heroes and defend your base from unstoppable waves of enemies. Learn how to summon, upgrade, and strategize your team to survive longer and climb the ranks in Anime Last Stand ⚔️.
Anime Last Stand ⚔️ is a tower defense and strategy game where your favorite anime heroes become your ultimate defenders. You’ll summon units from banners, place them on the map, and upgrade their abilities to survive increasingly tougher waves. With Worlds, raids, boss modes, and Techniques that boost your units, there’s always a new way to optimize your team and push further. Highlights:
⚔️ Deploy anime heroes with unique powers, ranges, and attack patterns
🔥 Clear Story, Challenges, Raids, and special events across multiple Worlds
💎 Summon and evolve units, then buff them further with Techniques
🏆 Farm meta units like Garou, Halloween legendaries, and later Godly units
🤝 Team up in co-op modes for extra drops, Spirit Shards, and rare materials
Read all about Anime Last Stand ⚔️ and get the best tricks and tips here 🌟

name: [🧧 NOW!] Raise Animals
image_alt: [🧧 NOW!] Raise Animals - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about [🧧 NOW!] Raise Animals
about_game:
Welcome to the wholesome world of Raise Animals 🐾 - a cozy Roblox life-sim where you care for pets, build your dream farm, and grow a thriving animal family. Learn how to raise happy creatures, expand your land, and unlock rare breeds while keeping your animals healthy and loved.
Raise Animals 🐾 is a heartwarming Roblox farming and pet-care simulator where you raise adorable animals, expand your ranch, and nurture each creature to full happiness. Collect, breed, and trade pets while earning coins to upgrade barns, fields, and decorations. Whether you’re feeding bunnies or caring for cows, every animal has its own charm and routine. Highlights:
🐄 Feed, pet, and care for a variety of adorable animals
🌾 Build and upgrade your farm for more space and resources
💰 Earn coins from animal products, trades, and daily quests
🐣 Breed animals to unlock rare and colorful variants
🎨 Decorate your farm with fences, gardens, and cozy designs
Read all about Raise Animals 🐾 and get the best tricks and tips here🌻

name: [BLACK DEATH] Jujutsu Shenanigans
image_alt: [BLACK DEATH] Jujutsu Shenanigans - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about [BLACK DEATH] Jujutsu Shenanigans
about_game:
Jujutsu Shenanigans 🤞🔥 drops you straight into the cursed energy-fueled world of Jujutsu Kaisen where button-mashing will get you demolished. Combat is deeper than most anime games, making skill, M1 trading, and ability timing essential for winning intense PvP fights and battlegrounds encounters. Highlights:
⚔️ Master character-specific cursed techniques and neutral combat
🔥 Fight through deep, skill-based PvP, quests, and massive boss battles
💎 Upgrade abilities, manage cursed energy, and unlock new tactical layers
🌍 Progress through a punishing learning curve to dominate the lobby
🏆 Earn rare items, cursed tools, and unique drops from group challenges
Read all about Jujutsu Shenanigans 🤞🔥 and get the best tricks and tips here 💥

name: Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐]
image_alt: Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐] - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
about_title: Everything you need to know about Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐]
about_game:
Test your luck and chase rare auras in Sol’s RNG 🌞 - a Roblox game where every roll could unlock something extraordinary. Learn how to maximize your odds, collect divine auras, and flex your rarest finds with cosmic style.
Sol’s RNG 🌞 is a Roblox luck-based collector game where you stand on a small island and roll for auras with wildly different rarities. Every press of the Roll button has a chance to give you something common… or a one-in-a-billion flex. As you play, you’ll store auras in your inventory, craft gear at Jake’s Workshop, and upgrade potions with Stella to push your luck even higher.
Highlights:
🌞 Roll infinitely for dozens of unique auras with massively different rarity tiers
💫 Use luck boosts like 2x rolls, Auto Roll, and crafted items to speed up progress
🧪 Collect and upgrade potions to get powerful temporary luck buffs
⚙️ Craft items at Jake’s Workshop that improve luck or reduce roll cooldown
📦 Manage storage, coins, and recipes while chasing the rarest auras in the game
Read all about Sol’s RNG 🌞 and get the best tricks and tips here 💫
